articles.title: Americans All Negative For Hantavirus, French Patient Critically Ill (Live Updates) - Forbes

articles.title: Is the U.S. slipping into 'Competitive Authoritarianism?' - NPR
articles.description: What form of government do we have in America now? Some scholars say it is no longer liberal democracy, but "competitive authoritarianism." NPR's Frank Langfitt explains the term and its origin.
articles.content:
What kind of political system do we have in America these days?
Some experts say the United States is no longer a liberal democracy, but operating under a system called "competitive authoritarianism… [+3452 chars]
